working_on.notes: Version 1.3.8 released. Fixed morning-schedule-bias bug and OTA ghost notification. Added detailed logging.

pending_tasks.task: Monitor user feedback on OTA update reliability with cache-buster

recent_changes.description: Version 1.3.8: Fixed schedule selection logic (closest-to-current), Added OTA cache-buster, Detailed system logs.
Version 1.3.7: Removed active voice listening for privacy, optimized languages to VN/EN, unified version display.

errors_encountered.error: OTA Update notification persisted after successful upgrade
errors_encountered.solution: Added System.currentTimeMillis() as a query parameter to the GitHub Raw URL to bypass cache.
Updated pickScheduleForFirstOpen to filter for currently active range and choose the closest midpoint.

decisions_made.reason: Increases user trust and simplifies Google Play/security compliance since active listening was non-essential.

decisions_made.decision: Use timestamp query for version check
decisions_made.reason: Prevents stale version data from GitHub CDN/Proxies without requiring a dedicated backend.
